tag.name: Waulter - Consent State Sync (localStorage + Cookie)

parameter.value:
<script>
(function() {
  var dl = window.dataLayer || [];
  var lastEvent = null;
  for (var i = dl.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (dl[i] && dl[i].event === 'Waulter:Decision') {
      lastEvent = dl[i];
      break;
    }
  }
  if (!lastEvent) return;
  var state = {
    decision: lastEvent.decision || '',
    purposes: lastEvent.purposes || [],
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  };
  var stateJson = JSON.stringify(state);
  try { localStorage.setItem('waulter_consent', stateJson); } catch(e) {}
  try {
    var expires = new Date();
    expires.setDate(expires.getDate() + 90);
    document.cookie = 'waulter_consent=' + encodeURIComponent(stateJson) +
      ';expires=' + expires.toUTCString() + ';path=/;SameSite=Lax';
  } catch(e) {}
})();
</script>

tag.notes: Writes consent state to localStorage and cookie on every Waulter:Decision.

trigger.name: Waulter - All Consent Granted
trigger.notes: Core: fires when user grants ALL consent.

trigger.name: Waulter - All Consent Exception
trigger.notes: Core: blocks tags when full consent not given.

trigger.name: Waulter - Decision Changed
trigger.notes: Core: fires on page init and consent change.

trigger.name: Waulter - [PC002] Analytics & Optimization Category Granted
trigger.notes: Category PC002: fires when ANY analytics & optimization purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - [PC002] Analytics & Optimization Category Exception
trigger.notes: Category PC002: blocks when NO analytics & optimization purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - [PC003] Website Functionality Category Granted
trigger.notes: Category PC003: fires when ANY website functionality purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - [PC003] Website Functionality Category Exception
trigger.notes: Category PC003: blocks when NO website functionality purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - [PC006] Other & Advanced Tracking Category Granted
trigger.notes: Category PC006: fires when ANY other & advanced tracking purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - [PC006] Other & Advanced Tracking Category Exception
trigger.notes: Category PC006: blocks when NO other & advanced tracking purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - [PC008] Marketing Category Granted
trigger.notes: Category PC008: fires when ANY marketing purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - [PC008] Marketing Category Exception
trigger.notes: Category PC008: blocks when NO marketing purpose is accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - AB Testing Exception
trigger.notes: Purpose-level: blocks when PU050 not accepted.

trigger.name: Waulter - No Consent (Block GA4)
trigger.notes: Composite. Add child triggers: [PC002] Analytics Exception + [PC008] Marketing Exception.

variable.name: Waulter - [PC001] Cookie Management Category Allowed
variable.notes: C011 PC001 — Cookie Management. Technical purposes, always granted. No triggers needed.

variable.name: Waulter - [PC002] Analytics & Optimization Category Allowed
variable.notes: C011 PC002 — Website Improvement & Optimization. Controls tags requiring analytics_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - [PC003] Website Functionality Category Allowed

parameter.value:
function() {
  var purposes = {{Waulter - Purposes}};
  if (Array.isArray(purposes)) {
    return purposes.indexOf("PU025") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU026") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU027") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU028") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU029") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU031") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU032") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU034") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU035") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU036") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU037") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU038") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU075") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU095") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU097") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU098") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU100") > -1 ||
           purposes.indexOf("PU101") > -1;
  }
  return false;
}

variable.notes: C011 PC003 — Website Functionality. Controls tags requiring functionality_storage, personalization_storage.

variable.name: Waulter - [PC004] Website Security Category Allowed
variable.notes: C011 PC004 — Website Security. Includes PU039, PU040 (technical), PU081.

variable.name: Waulter - [PC005] Service Provision Category Allowed
variable.notes: C011 PC005 — Service Provision. No triggers (single purpose).

variable.name: Waulter - [PC006] Other & Advanced Tracking Category Allowed
variable.notes: C011 PC006 — Other / Advanced Individual Tracking. Includes PU054, PU068, PU069 (technical), PU070 (technical), PU076.

variable.name: Waulter - [PC007] Website Monitoring Category Allowed
variable.notes: C011 PC007 — Website Monitoring. Functional monitoring. No triggers.

variable.name: Waulter - [PC008] Marketing Category Allowed
variable.notes: C011 PC008 — Marketing. Controls tags requiring ad_storage, ad_personalization, ad_user_data.

variable.name: Waulter - [PC009] Customer Records CRM Category Allowed
variable.notes: C011 PC009 — Customer Records (CRM). No triggers (single purpose).
